name: ed3d-plugins
description: Collection of Claude Code plugins centered around a research-plan-implement (RPI) workflow. Includes plan-and-execute, house style, basic agents, research agents, Playwright automation, and hooks for skill reinforcement and CLAUDE.md updates.
scan_summary: Well-designed multi-plugin collection with RPI workflow, agent definitions, and hooks. Hook scripts (hook-reminder.sh) emit JSON-formatted context injection for Claude — benign shell script using cat heredoc. hooks.json defines Claude Code hook configuration. No license file found. Plugin system uses .claude-plugin marketplace.json format. Derived partially from obra/superpowers (credited). Python used in Playwright plugin for automation.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
